response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced staff-level software engineer with an impressive background at top tech companies, but fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development on Windows. Their professional experience is heavily focused on web technologies, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, with no relevant background in fixed income, capital markets, or enterprise SQL Server/Oracle databases.
strengths: Impressive track record as a Senior/Staff Software Engineer at top-tier technology companies like Google and Meta.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, test-driven development, and software craftsmanship.
Demonstrated experience in the financial technology sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, showing only a brief 7-month stint in 2014-2015.
Missing required Windows platform expertise, with a strong background primarily in Linux environments.
No domain experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking.
